transcript.narration: You search The Rusty Tankard but find nothing of value.

dm_turns.label: look around thornhold
dm_turns.scene: You push through the battered door of The Rusty Tankard, the hinges groaning like a dying beast. Inside, the common room is a graveyard of broken stools and overturned tables, thick with dust and the sour reek of spilled ale long since dried. Pale light filters through cracked shutters, illuminating motes that drift lazily in the still air. You sift through the wreckage—tapping floorboards, checking behind the bar, rummaging through cupboards—but the place has been picked clean. Not a copper coin, not a half-empty bottle, not even a moldy crust of bread remains. Whatever happened here, it happened thoroughly.

choices.label: Defend
choices.description: Take defensive stance (disadvantage on attacks against you)

details._original_msg: I look around Thornhold. What do I notice?

dm_turns.label: statue examination
dm_turns.scene: The Rusty Tankard stands silent as a tomb. Dust motes drift through shafts of pale light, settling on overturned stools and a bar scarred by old knife fights. You call out, but your voice dies in the emptiness, swallowed by the rot-stained walls. No answer comes. No footsteps creak on the floorboards above, no muffled voice calls from the cellar. The tavern has been abandoned long enough that even the rats seem to have moved on.

intent_used.target: old stone statue in the town square
